generators.description: Point the Kodak in roughly the right direction. Tap to gain 1 Sighting. At 10 owned, a Tourist with a Brownie takes over.

upgrades.name: Telephoto Lens
upgrades.description: Now the blur is far away AND big.

upgrades.name: Bus Tours of the Hot Zone
upgrades.description: Tourists rotate through Willow Creek hourly.

generators.description: The county weekly runs a front-page eyewitness piece. Steady Sighting production.

upgrades.name: Sheriff's Quote Department
upgrades.description: Every county sheriff in three states owes us a comment.

upgrades.name: Composite Eyewitness
upgrades.description: Two real anonymous tipsters combine into one juicy named one.

upgrades.name: Plant the Tipster
upgrades.description: We supply the witness, the witness's story, AND the witness's indignation.

generators.description: One AP dispatch from Willow Creek hits two hundred dailies by morning.

upgrades.name: Stringer Pool
upgrades.description: One slanted dispatch reprinted in three hundred small-town dailies by sundown.

upgrades.name: Transatlantic Tabloid Deal
upgrades.description: Fleet Street and the New York tabloids run the same hook on the same day.

upgrades.name: Anonymous Correspondent
upgrades.description: A foreign-bureau byline that has never existed; readers don't notice.

generators.description: Sixteen-millimeter, hand-held, conveniently shaky. Compounds Sighting output.

upgrades.name: 16mm Color Stock
upgrades.description: Color makes the suit feel real. Cheaper than fixing the suit.

upgrades.name: Forest Sound Stage
upgrades.description: Re-enactments shot on a fenced-off Oregon clearing, passed as wildlife.

upgrades.name: Optical Compositing
upgrades.description: Splice the costume into the footprint footage. Critics will argue for fifty years.

generators.description: A barn-side billboard, a gift shop, a five-dollar 'glimpse' tour. Cryptid tourism.

upgrades.name: Testimonial Stable
upgrades.description: Fifty grateful 'witnesses' on retainer, $5 a quote in the guestbook.

upgrades.name: Chamber-of-Commerce Backing
upgrades.description: The town officially adopts the cryptid as its mascot. T-shirts at the gas station.

upgrades.name: Cryptid Festival
upgrades.description: Annual three-day event; 30,000 attendees; sponsors line up.

generators.description: A 60-second film clip that becomes the foundational evidence for an entire field. Decades of careful re-analysis. Decades of careful arguments. Compounds Sightings.

upgrades.name: Film Festival Premiere
upgrades.description: Sneak the clip into the documentary circuit; reviewers cannot agree.

upgrades.name: Foreign Press Tour
upgrades.description: London, Tokyo, Moscow — every wire service picks up the same still frame.

upgrades.name: A Generation of Believers
upgrades.description: Even when partially debunked, the original reel keeps spreading. The kids of the original eyewitnesses defend it.

prestige_bridge_copy: The forests empty of tourists. The lake settles. And up there — between the satellites and the high-altitude weather balloons — something rolls a metallic disc just inside the edge of radar. The cryptids have flying machines now.
